title: Help with connect-src blockers

posts.author: spade (Srikanth P)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m trying to build an integration recipe using the sample Python Flask App.

I seem to be facing issue after authorization where connect-src is blocking the url https://unpkg.com/@rive-app/canvas@2.19.7/rive.wasm, below is screenshot from browser console

mday_ap_er810×394 20.5 KB

Thanks in advance…

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @spade and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it (such as account ID, app IDs, timestamps, etc.) so that our team can take a look into it?

posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @spade!
